name: Lebanon
summary: Day 68 Wednesday. **DAY 10/14 OF ISRAELI-CIVILIAN-CASUALTY TRIGGER WINDOW (closes May 11) — NO ISRAELI CIVILIAN CASUALTY INSIDE ISRAEL PROPER.** May 5 produced Hezbollah rocket launches at IDF positions in southern Lebanon (no IDF casualties), a Hezbollah drone crashed near Israeli forces in southern Lebanon (no casualties), and Israeli Air Force successfully intercepted multiple aerial targets following sirens for a suspected drone infiltration — targets downed before crossing into Israeli territory. German FM Annalena Baerbock said May 5 Israel has 'every right' to be in south Lebanon while warning of conflict damages. Asymmetry framework holds: 2,659+ Lebanese killed cumulatively since March 2 vs zero Israeli civilian casualties inside Israel proper since latest cycle. Importantly, the Lebanon front remained PARALLEL-PRESSURED while the US-Iran track moved to pause — Israel comfortable with US handling Iran while Israel handles Lebanon (Israeli editorial outlets framed Trump pause factually, NOT as betrayal). Apr 23 Trump-extension of Lebanon ceasefire technically alive but operationally hollow. Hezbollah SG Naim Qassem still 'categorically rejects' Lebanon-Israel direct talks. Trigger window closes May 11 — if no civilian casualty by then, asymmetry framework consolidates as structural intelligence (Hezbollah operationally degraded, NOT just paused).

active_triggers.condition: Hezbollah-IDF kinetic produces Israeli civilian casualty within 14 days (by 2026-05-11) — full re-escalation activated

historical_summaries.summary: 6 signals. Israel launched ground incursion into southern Lebanon against Hezbollah | At least 41 killed in Israeli air attacks on Bekaa Valley | Lebanese PM Salam demanded Hezbollah surrender weapons and restrict to political activities

31 signals. Beirut airstrike killed Hezbollah's southern front commander Haj Youssef Ismail Hashem on April 1 — the most senior Hezbollah commander kill | Israel struck Lebanon April 1 concurrent with Trump primetime address and ongoing Iran campaign | Israeli strikes killed 2 girls and wounded 40 near Tyre
